commit.message:
Add Prometheus exporter (--prom-port)

New optional /metrics endpoint exposing latest metric values in
Prometheus text exposition format. Enables real-time Grafana dashboards
via SSH tunnel when Grafana is on a different machine.

- New prom_exporter module with MetricsStore (thread-safe latest-value store)
- Renders gauge, counter, histogram (as _sum/_count) with proper labels
- 10 new unit tests for rendering, label escaping, sanitization
- Updated writer to feed MetricsStore on each flush
- Updated both READMEs with Prometheus usage docs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: otel_dumper
repository.description: OTLP Metrics receiver that dumps data to SQLite and JSONL for offline analysis and Grafana visualization

commit.message:
🔧 chore: add release pipeline (deploy workflows + tag/release scripts) (#41)

- Add .github/workflows/deploy-test.yml: deploys to test on v*-rc* tags via Coolify
- Add .github/workflows/deploy-prod.yml: deploys to prod on GitHub Release published
- Add scripts/tag.ts: bumps version, pushes RC tag → test deploys
- Add scripts/release.ts: promotes latest RC to GitHub Release → prod deploys
- Add `bun tag` and `bun run release` scripts to package.json
- Update scripts/README.md with full release workflow docs

Workflow:
  bun tag patch      → v1.2.0-rc1 → test deploys
  bun run release    → GitHub Release v1.2.0 → prod deploys

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

✨ feat: add WebSocket support with JWT auth and proactive token refresh (#40)

- Backend: add backend/ws/wsServer.ts with handleWsUpgrade (JWT via ?token=),
  wsHandlers (open/close/message), and broadcast() for server-push events
- Backend: add backend/routes/wsRoutes.ts exposing GET /api/ws
- Backend: register wsHandlers and wsRoutes in server.ts
- Frontend: add WsManager<TMessage> class with exponential backoff reconnect,
  singleton wsManager exported from frontend/shared/services/wsManager.ts
- Frontend: add useWebSocket hook (frontend/shared/hooks/useWebSocket.ts) that
  connects/disconnects based on Redux auth token
- Frontend: replace AuthProvider's on-mount-only check with proactive refresh
  scheduled 60s before token expiry — session stays alive indefinitely
- knip: add backend/ws/*.ts and frontend/shared/{services,hooks}/*.ts as entries

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

✨ feat: OpenPanel analytics, BUN_PUBLIC Coolify pattern, backend/features/ (#39)

- Replace Rybbit with OpenPanel (@openpanel/web): analyticsProvider, useAnalytics,
  docker-compose.openpanel.yml, docker/openpanel/ config files; remove Rybbit stack
- Add window.__APP_CONFIG__ runtime injection in serveProdBuild.ts so Coolify
  deployments get correct BUN_PUBLIC_* values without an image rebuild
- Update frontend/config.ts to prefer window.__APP_CONFIG__ over import.meta.env
- Add BUN_PUBLIC ARG/ENV in Dockerfile and build.args + runtime env in docker-compose.yml
- Update bun-env.d.ts: OpenPanel vars, Window.__APP_CONFIG__ interface
- Move backend/mail, backend/telemetry, backend/validation → backend/features/*
- Update all @backend/{mail,telemetry,validation} imports to @backend/features/*
- Update all READMEs to reflect new structure and OpenPanel integration

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: elliotttmiller <61537169+elliotttmiller@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: prevent dependency version regression during installation

The installer previously used --repositories-file pointing only to the
local payload repo, causing APK to resolve shared dependencies (luci-lib-*,
ucode, etc.) from SDK-era packages. This downgraded already-installed
system packages to older versions.

Fix: include system repos (/etc/apk/repositories.d/*) in the repos file
so APK prefers newer device versions for shared deps, while still using
the local payload for passwall-specific packages. Falls back to local
payload when offline.

Also add .gitignore for build artifacts.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: resolve feed packages via package/feeds/ symlinks for correct make targets

The compile phase was searching 'feeds package' directories with grep,
which found raw feed paths (e.g., feeds/base/network/services/dnsmasq)
that aren't valid make targets. This caused dnsmasq-full and nftables
compilation to fail with 'No rule to make target'.

Fix: first check package/feeds/ symlinks (the canonical make target
paths created by './scripts/feeds install'), then fall back to grepping
'package' before 'feeds' to prefer valid paths.

Also includes minor robustness improvements (|| : guards, TMPDIR usage).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Penrose Tiling educational poster generator

Implement penrose_tiling_poster.py following the exact conventions of
the existing poster generators (cellular_automata_poster.py, etc.):

- P3 Robinson triangle subdivision algorithm using the golden ratio
- Initial wheel of 10 golden triangles, subdivided iteratively
- Thin triangles (type 0) split into 2; thick (type 1) into 3
- SVG rendering with themed fill colors and stroke outlines
- Three annotations: Aperiodic Order, Five-Fold Symmetry, Golden Ratio
- Three educational panels: How It Works, Quasicrystals, Einstein Problem
- Full CLI with --subdivisions flag and common poster arguments
- Theme support (classic, blueprint, chalkboard)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: jlanej <6052453+jlanej@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: harden PHP backend against SQL injection and XSS vulnerabilities

- Replace all direct string concatenation in SQL queries with MySQLi prepared statements
- Add htmlspecialchars() and json_encode() to all HTML/JS output of user-controlled data
- Affects Api2/, admin/, api19/, profile/ directories

Files changed:
- Api2/get_page.php: replace direct $user_id SQL concatenation with prepared stmt
- Api2/get_partner_preferences.php: replace real_escape_string+concat with prepared stmts,
  fix inner getCountryNames/getStateNames/getDistrictNames helpers
- Api2/other_profile_new.php: replace $conn->query with interpolated $myid
- Api2/proposals_api.php: replace dynamic WHERE clause with prepared statement
- Api2/purposal_delete.php: replace direct SQL with prepared statements
- Api2/send_delete_request.php: fix critical injection via $delete_reason and $feedback
- Api2/update_token.php: validate user_id as integer before binding
- Api2/user_partner.php: replace entire real_escape_string pattern with prepared stmts
- admin/documents.php: fix XSS in Swal.fire JS output and action button onclick attrs
- api19/get.php: use intval for userid and integer bind_param type
- profile/doc.php: fix GET dynamic WHERE and POST direct SQL update
- profile/list/education.php: fix inner query with direct $typeId concatenation
- profile/update.php: replace real_escape_string+direct SQL with prepared statements

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: marriagestationpvtltd-lang <254104945+marriagestationpvtltd-lang@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add periodic ingestion stats logging

Logs throughput every 5 seconds once data starts arriving:
- Total rows and requests
- Rows/sec rate for the last interval
- Current buffer size

Also logs 'First data received' on the first incoming request.

commit.message:
Fix hang when all servers fail to start (e.g. port conflict)

Use tokio::select! to race ctrl_c against both server tasks completing.
If both servers exit (e.g. port already in use), the program now shuts
down automatically with clear error messages instead of hanging.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: otel_dumper
repository.description: OTLP Metrics receiver that dumps data to SQLite and JSONL for offline analysis and Grafana visualization

commit.message:
Fix writer exiting immediately when servers fail to bind

Root cause: main.rs dropped the channel sender (tx) before ctrl_c,
so if both servers failed to start (e.g. ports in use), all senders
were dropped and the writer exited immediately.

Fixes:
- Move drop(tx) to after ctrl_c + server abort
- gRPC server: bind TcpListener first, log only after successful bind,
  use serve_with_incoming instead of serve
- Add error logging for server startup failures

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Initial implementation: OTLP Metrics receiver with SQLite dump

- Dual protocol: gRPC (:4317) and HTTP (:4318) OTLP endpoints
- High throughput batch writer with tokio channel buffering
- SQLite WAL mode with optimized PRAGMAs for ~100K dp/s
- Supports all metric types: gauge, sum, histogram, exp_histogram, summary
- Fully static musl binary, single file deployment
- Grafana-ready via frser-sqlite-datasource plugin

commit.message:
Add double pendulum poster generator

Implements double_pendulum_poster.py following the same structure and
patterns as lorenz_poster.py and logistic_map_poster.py. Uses only the
Python standard library (math, xml.etree.ElementTree, argparse) and
shared utilities from poster_utils.

Features:
- RK4 integration of the double pendulum equations of motion
- Three trajectories with slightly different initial conditions to
  demonstrate sensitive dependence on initial conditions
- Tip-of-second-bob trace visualization with three distinct colors
- Three annotation callouts (sensitive dependence, phase space, energy)
- Three educational panels (equations, chaos vs random, physical systems)
- Full CLI with --steps argument and all common poster arguments

commit.message:
Cursor/development environment setup 3671 (#133)

* Add Cursor Cloud specific instructions for Linux development

- Document Linux-specific environment setup (GPU acceleration, node-pty rebuild, spawn-helper compilation)
- Document dev mode race condition workaround
- Note cr-sqlite and computer-use feature limitations on Linux
- Add tips for running Electron app and tests efficiently

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix cr-sqlite sync API to gracefully degrade on Linux

The sync API methods (getDbVersion, exportChangesSince, applyChanges)
threw when cr-sqlite extension was unavailable, preventing project
initialization on platforms without the extension (Linux).

Changed to return safe no-op defaults (0, [], empty result) instead
of throwing, allowing the sync service to initialize harmlessly
without CRDT sync capability.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Remove accidentally committed .ade db backup files

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix onboarding to trigger on new machines with tracked .ade directory

Check for ade.db (gitignored, machine-local) instead of the .ade
directory (tracked in git with shared config). This ensures onboarding
runs when a project is cloned to a new machine that has the shared
scaffold but no local runtime state.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add env var fallback for GitHub, Linear, and AI API key credentials

Allows headless/CI/cloud environments to provide credentials via
environment variables when Electron's safeStorage encrypted store
is empty or unavailable.

- GitHub: GITHUB_TOKEN or ADE_GITHUB_TOKEN
- Linear: LINEAR_API_KEY or ADE_LINEAR_TOKEN
- AI providers: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY,
  MISTRAL_API_KEY, DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, XAI_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY,
  TOGETHER_API_KEY, OPENROUTER_API_KEY

The encrypted store remains the primary source. Env vars are only
checked as a fallback when no stored credential is found.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Auto-complete onboarding when env var credentials are detected

When a project is opened for the first time on a new machine and
environment variables provide at least one credential (GitHub token,
AI API key, or Linear token), mark onboarding as complete so the
wizard is skipped. This lets cloud agents and CI environments that
set credentials via env vars go straight to the Work view.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix: expand AI provider env var check in onboarding auto-complete to cover all 9 supported providers

commit.message:
Add Shadow Lift preset using power-curve gamma algorithm

Implements the shadow lift algorithm with gamma=1.5 (exponent≈0.667).
The power curve raises dark tones more than bright tones while keeping
pure white anchored. Max deviation from identity is ~9,800 at i≈75,
well within the 32,000 driver safety limit.

体 (Field) と環 (Ring) の定義を追加

- Record Ring: 加法可換群 + 乗法モノイド + 分配法則の 11 公理
- Ring 基本補題: ring_add_zero_r, ring_add_neg_r, ring_add_cancel_l,
  ring_mul_zero_l/r, ring_neg_neg, ring_neg_mul_l/r
- Record Field: Ring への強制型変換 + field_inv + field_mul_comm +
  field_inv_l + field_one_ne_zero
#- Field 基本
: field_inv_r, field_inv_nonzero, field_no_zero_divisors,
  field_mul_cancel_l, field_div
- 補助補題: znz_prime_nonzero_coprime (素p に対し gcd(a mod p, p) = 1)
- znz_p_field: Admitted (field_inv の型設計が要検討)
- progress/field_plan.md, progress/field_progress.md を
- proof_knowledge_base.md に Ring/Field 関連の知識を追記

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Prove count_multiples_in_range and prime_pow_coprime_distinct

Both Admitted lemmas in integer.v are now fully proven, making
euler_phi_three_prime_powers Admitted-free.

New sub-lemmas added before count_multiples_in_range:
- mod_add_mul_small: (p*m+r) mod p = r for r < p
- filter_false_forall: Forall (f x = false) l -> filter f l = []
- filter_window_single_multiple: filter (k mod p =? 0) (seq (p*m) p) = [p*m]

Proofs:
- count_multiples_in_range: induction on m, seq_app + filter_app + above
- prime_pow_coprime_distinct: 3-step via prime_rel_prime/Zis_gcd_gcd,
  Z.coprime_pow_l/r, Z.gcd_greatest/divide_1_r

Updated progress/euler_phi_progress.md and proof_knowledge_base.md.

commit.message:
Add euler_phi definition and main theorem euler_phi_three_prime_powers

- euler_phi: Euler's totient function (counts k in {0,...,n-1} with gcd(k,n)=1)
- group_order_unique, group_order_iso, group_order_product: GroupOrder algebraic properties
- euler_phi_group_order: phi(n) = |units(Z/nZ)| via bijection
- znz_units_decomp2: 2-var CRT isomorphism (Z/pqZ)* ≅ (Z/pZ)* × (Z/qZ)*
- euler_phi_mul: multiplicativity phi(p*q) = phi(p)*phi(q) when gcd(p,q)=1
- prime_pow_coprime_iff: gcd(k,p^e)=1 ↔ k mod p ≠ 0 for prime p
- euler_phi_prime_pow: phi(p^e) = p^(e-1)*(p-1) for prime p, e≥1 (depends on Admitted count lemma)
- nat_gcd_mul_coprime: gcd(a,c)=1 ∧ gcd(b,c)=1 → gcd(a*b,c)=1 (Nat level, via Gauss)
- euler_phi_three_prime_powers: main theorem phi(p^e*q^f*r^g) = p^(e-1)(p-1)*q^(f-1)(q-1)*r^(g-1)(r-1)
  (depends on Admitted: count_multiples_in_range, prime_pow_coprime_distinct)
